title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Miniklub South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Miniklub South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Miniklub South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Miniklub South Asia Partners:
Miniklub South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub South Asia Partners!
